goalText: Hunt 18 Deer with Tiger strikes before moves run out

blockers.name: Rhino
blockers.rule: Heavyweight blocker: cannot be eaten or swapped.

note: Rules per KING_OF_JUNGLE_DESIGN_RULES.md — Zone I Starter Plains. Grid always 6x6, Tiger food-chain strikes hunt Deer/Goat, rare Rhino blockers are persistent, and Deer matches do not count as hunts.
